title: I'd Receive the Worst News from Your Beautiful Lips
original_title: Eu Receberia as Piores Notícias dos Seus Lindos Lábios
overview: In a remote part of the Amazon, a traveling photographer has an intense affair with a preacher's wife, but secrets from her past threaten to ruin them both.
